data.title: Intermittent 401 errors from auth-service under concurrent load
data.description:
## Symptom

During peak traffic (~2k RPS) customers and internal services report sporadic **401 Unauthorized** responses from **auth-service**. Failures are non-deterministic — the same bearer token succeeds on retry.

## Observed behavior

- api-gateway access logs show bursts of `401` on `/v1/introspect` and `/v1/refresh`
- checkout-api and user-profile-api see downstream 401s when forwarding tokens
- Error rate spikes to ~3% for 5–10 minute windows, then clears without deploys
- No obvious correlation with deploys, key rotation, or client version

## Initial triage

- Redis and Postgres look healthy
- JWT signing keys unchanged
- No recent auth-service config changes

## Status

Root cause **not yet identified**. Tracking as active incident.

## Links

- Grafana: auth-service 401 rate panel
- PagerDuty: PD-AUTH-401-SPIKE
